name: Snowy Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Place apricots in a 2-quart saucepan and add enough water to cover. Heat to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes, then drain. Cool, chop, and reserve.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix butter with granulated sugar and Bisquick baking mix until crumbly. Spread the mixture into an ungreased jelly roll pan, about 15 x 10 x 1 inch.
3. Bake for 10 minutes. Beat together brown sugar and eggs. Stir in chopped apricots, 2/3 cup Bisquick baking mix, vanilla, and nuts. Spread over the baked layer.
4. Bake for an additional 30 minutes until set. Allow to cool completely. Cut into bars, about 2 x 1 inch. Roll in powdered sugar. Makes approximately 75 cookies.
